PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, BETTY "TC'B" 24 HR CLEANING SERVICE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BANKS, BETTY "TC'B" 24 HR CLEANING SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KELLEY, CURTIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-02-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-12-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLEY, CURTIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANKS, BETTY "TC'B" 24 HR CLEANING SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BANKS, BETTY "TC'B" 24 HR CLEANING SERVICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KELLEY, CURTIS THE CROSS CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF DEFENDANT BANKS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
